reason_not_populated_now: Populating this inventory requires running the M1->M15 aggregation over the committed design-span M1 data to produce derived M15 files and their SHA-256 checksums. That aggregation code does not yet exist (it is a gate-5 code-only implementation deliverable) and must be created under the value-pinned tests in design_m15_derivation_manifest.json before any real derivation. Fabricating checksums here is forbidden.

required_schema_per_file.sha256: 64-hex of the derived M15 file bytes
